label: Plants
items: Fixed the "care guide updated" badge showing on every AI plant forever — it now only appears for genuine updates.
Care-guide updates are now reviewable: see exactly what changed (old → new values) and choose "Apply updates" to take the new guidance or "Keep mine" to stay as you are.
The Shed badge is now a calm "Update available" chip instead of a per-field count.
Editing a library or AI plant now clearly explains that your personal copy stops receiving automatic updates.
